serverInfo.name: RelaxAI-CodeExecution
serverInfo.title: Relax AI Code Execution
serverInfo.description: Run Python code through Relax AI's secure Code Execution API. The tool executes snippets in an isolated sandbox for calculations, data analysis, pandas/numpy/scipy workflows, and matplotlib/seaborn plots, returning structured stdout, stderr, exit code, execution time, security scan status, policy violations, and generated plot images.
